title: Campus Operations Portal
description: A Laravel-based internal portal for timetable coordination, staff notices, and student service requests used by academic administrators.

title: Examination Workflow System
description: A Laravel web application that manages assessment schedules, marks submission workflows, and departmental approval pipelines.

title: Research Collaboration Hub
description: A MERN platform that helps lecturers and students post research topics, track milestones, and share publication resources.

title: Smart Attendance Mobile
description: A React Native app for course attendance capture with QR validation, offline sync, and lecturer dashboards.
